title: Trevesia pleiosperma
taxonomy: Trevesia pleiosperma is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is native to New Guinea and the surrounding islands. The plant is classified within the genus Trevesia, which is part of the Araliaceae family. The Araliaceae family consists of flowering plants commonly known as ginseng or ivy, with over 200 species found globally. The classification of Trevesia pleiosperma provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Araliaceae family.
